steps: Go to https://marketplace.zoom.us and sign in with your Zoom account
Click 'Develop' in the top menu, then select 'Build App'
Choose 'OAuth' as the app type for user-delegated access
Enter your app name and choose whether the app is intended for account-level or user-level access
Toggle 'Would you like to publish this app on the Zoom App Marketplace?' to OFF for a private app
Fill in the required fields including redirect URL and allow list
Note your Client ID and Client Secret on the 'App Credentials' page
Add the required scopes under the 'Scopes' tab (e.g. meeting:read, meeting:write)
Click 'Continue' through all steps to activate the app

credential_fields.name: client_id
credential_fields.label: Client ID
credential_fields.description: The OAuth 2.0 Client ID from your Zoom Marketplace app

credential_fields.name: client_secret
credential_fields.label: Client Secret
credential_fields.description: The OAuth 2.0 Client Secret from your Zoom Marketplace app

notes: Free Zoom account is sufficient to create Marketplace apps
For server-to-server (no user interaction), create a 'Server-to-Server OAuth' app type instead
Server-to-Server apps additionally provide an Account ID credential
Apps remain in 'Development' status until submitted and approved for publishing
Rate limits vary by endpoint — most are 30 requests per second per account
Redirect URL must be HTTPS for production use

test_endpoint.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's Zoom profile
